_comment: Registration source for piggyback.py. One entry per hook script. To add a new script: drop the file in the repo, add an entry here, then run `piggyback register <name>`. 'script' is relative to the repo root (the dir holding piggyback.py). A folder usually matches its entry key, but a larger feature may host several scripts under one folder (e.g. ssot-diagram/ hosts the decision-index engine + hook). 'scope' decides which settings.json gets the hook: global = ~/.claude/settings.json (every project), repo = ./.claude/settings.json (current repo only). 'desc' is shown in the `piggyback init` picker. Each hook = one Claude Code event + matcher; a script may register several.

impact-analyzer.desc: PostToolUse:Read — show callers affected by what you just read

codegraph-gate.desc: codegraph-first ordering gate — steer Grep/Glob/Read after codegraph

decision-index.desc: surface stale ADRs on Read (anchors drifted in codegraph)
